subject: new role for nerc - enron's position

emails.subject: RE: New Role for NERC - Enron's Position
emails.subject_base: New Role for NERC - Enron's Position
emails.body: RE: New Role for NERC Enron's Position Charles Jose The spinmisters are already at work. People at FERC thought we had bought into the "new NERC" Enron DOES NOT SUPPORT NERC in working through commercial issues. We need to develop our opinions of where to go next, but right now you can respond to Dave Nevius that we still don't believe that NERC and its process/organziation is the right vehicle. We are willing to find a way to do this, but we can't have the same SRO bullshit that they have been saying for 3 years. Sorry I missed the call. I'll talk with you guys Friday. Jim

emails.subject: RE: New Role for NERC - Enron's Position
emails.subject_base: New Role for NERC - Enron's Position
emails.body: I am working on a "issues" list that outlines what Enron supports irregardless of what organization fulfills oure needs. On today's call we reiterated the anti-SRO position and that we, last week, support the NERC "direction", and not the organization itself. NERC's Board just approved a new direction not a new organization.

emails.subject: RE: New Role for NERC - Enron's Position
